steps.title: Find the two points
steps.content:
Use the parabola equation to find the corresponding $y$-values.
$$a=2^2-12=-8$$
$$b=6^2-12=24$$
So the points are
$$(2,-8) \quad \text{and} \quad (6,24)$$

steps.title: Calculate the slope
steps.content:
Use the slope formula with those two points.
$$m=\frac{24-(-8)}{6-2}$$
$$m=\frac{32}{4}=8$$
The answer is A.
